articles.title: 2025 Budget Cuts: How Healthcare, Medicare, Medicaid, and Food Assistance Programs Are Affecting Millions of Americans
articles.subtitle: 17 Million Americans Losing Coverage, 51,000+ Additional Deaths Projected Annually
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: The 2025 federal budget legislation and government shutdown have triggered unprecedented changes affecting 17 million Americans' health insurance coverage and over 51,000 additional deaths annually. Critical analysis of Medicare cuts, Medicaid work requirements, ACA subsidies elimination, and SNAP benefits reductions.
articles.imageQuery: government building healthcare crisis, medical protest budget cuts, hospital emergency, healthcare policy, Medicare Medicaid, photojournalism, editorial photography

articles.title: How Wall Street Steals From Every Worker in America
articles.subtitle: The Stock Market's Greatest Scam: Your Labor, Their Profit
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: Meet Maria, who cleans corporate offices for $12 an hour while shareholders extract millions from her labor. This is how the stock market has become a sophisticated wealth extraction machine that turns worker productivity into shareholder profits.
articles.imageQuery: cleaning lady office building, low wage worker, corporate headquarters janitor, economic inequality workplace, photojournalism

articles.title: Why You've Got More Money Than Ever Yet Are Poorer Than Ever
articles.subtitle: How Rich People Are Suffocating Our Nation
articles.author: Oroka Conner
articles.description: An in-depth analysis of how wealth inequality has reached critical levels, examining the paradox of increased nominal wealth alongside decreased purchasing power and quality of life for the average person.
articles.imageQuery: economic inequality protest, rich vs poor contrast, social justice rally, wealth disparity, photojournalism, editorial photography
